A corrected and more coherent version of the quote might be:

"Famous quote: 'You and I, people like us, no matter what we do, there will always be others who dislike us. So, it's better for us to do what we do best.'"

Please note, the quote is reformatted for clarity but without knowing the exact source, this is a general paraphrasing.
